text.title: shadcn/ui Architecture Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of shadcn/ui Architecture. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: `<Button>` imports useAuth; every feature touches Button.
antipattern.fix: Extract to feature wrapper; restore Button to generic primitive.

antipattern.symptom: Button has 14 variants; visual QA can't cover them all.
antipattern.fix: Refactor to base variants + compoundVariants for state combos; cap per prop at 6.

antipattern.symptom: Dark mode mismatch: cards stay `bg-white` while page is `bg-gray-900`.
antipattern.fix: Replace concrete shades with semantic tokens; add ESLint rule to ban concrete colour utilities outside `globals.css`.

antipattern.symptom: Radix `asChild` breaks; refs come back undefined; tooltips do not attach.
antipattern.fix: Wrap in `React.forwardRef`; set `displayName`; add ESLint rule `require-forwardRef` for components/ui/*.
